message:
✨ Expand multi-component projects + add workflow quality checks (#15)

Multi-component CNCF projects (13 sub-projects across 8 parents):
- argo: +argo-workflows, +argo-events, +argo-rollouts
- falco: +falcosidekick
- fluentd: +fluent-bit
- flux: +flagger
- knative: +knative-eventing
- linkerd: +linkerd-viz
- prometheus: +alertmanager, +node-exporter, +pushgateway
- opentelemetry: +opentelemetry-collector, +opentelemetry-operator

Total projects: 217 → 230

Mission title clarity for sub-projects:
- Parent: 'Install and Configure Argo on Kubernetes'
- Sub: 'Install and Configure Argo Rollouts (Argo) on Kubernetes'
- cncfProjects includes both parent and sub name for grouping

Workflow quality checks added to collect job:
- Schema validation (validate-schema.mjs on all generated files)
- Security scan (scanForSensitiveData + scanForMaliciousContent)
- Link validation (HTTP HEAD on sourceUrls)
- Version freshness (compare projectVersion vs latest release)
- Index rebuild (build-index.mjs + commit updated index.json)
- Command smoke test (validate CLI commands in random sample)
- Generation summary annotation (GitHub Step Summary)
- PR auto-labels (auto-generated, install-missions)

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:
@@ -97,6 +97,11 @@ jobs:
     runs-on: ubuntu-latest
     steps:
       - uses: actions/checkout@v4
+      - uses: actions/setup-node@v4
+        with:
+          node-version: '20'
+      - name: Install dependencies
+        run: cd scripts && npm install --no-audit
       - name: Download all batch artifacts
         uses: actions/download-artifact@v4
         with:
@@ -111,11 +116,6 @@ jobs:
           echo "**Batches:** ${{ needs.plan.outputs.batch_count }}" >> install-report.md
           echo "" >> install-report.md
 
-          TOTAL_SCORE=0
-          SCORE_COUNT=0
-          TOTAL_FAIL=0
-          TOTAL_PROJECTS=0
-
           for f in install-report-*.md; do
             if [ -f "$f" ]; then
               echo "---" >> install-report.md
@@ -135,9 +135,7 @@ jobs:
           echo "Found $PUBLISHED published, $DRAFTS draft missions"
 
           # Batch-level quality gate (Gate 7)
-          # Check average score and failure rate from reports
           if [ "$TOTAL" -gt 0 ]; then
-            # Extract scores from reports using grep
             SCORES=$(grep -oP 'Score.*?\| (\d+)' install-report-*.md 2>/dev/null | grep -oP '\d+$' || echo "")
             if [ -n "$SCORES" ]; then
               AVG=$(echo "$SCORES" | awk '{ sum += $1; n++ } END { if (n > 0) print int(sum/n); else print 0 }')
@@ -168,6 +166,134 @@ jobs:
           fi
           echo "count=$COUNT" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
 
+      # ── Quality checks ──────────────────────────────────────────
+      - name: 'Quality: Schema validation'
+        if: steps.check.outputs.count != '0'
+        run: |
+          echo "## Schema Validation" >> install-report.md
+          FILES=$(find solutions/cncf-install -name '*.json' ! -name '.gitkeep')
+          if [ -n "$FILES" ]; then
+            node scripts/validate-schema.mjs $FILES 2>&1 | tee -a install-report.md
+          fi
+
+      - name: 'Quality: Security scan'
+        if: steps.check.outputs.count != '0'
+        run: |
+          echo "" >> install-report.md
+          echo "## Security Scan" >> install-report.md
+          FINDINGS=0
+          for f in $(find solutions/cncf-install -name '*.json' ! -name '.gitkeep'); do
+            RESULT=$(node -e "
+              import {scanMissionFile} from './scripts/scanner.mjs';
+              import {readFileSync} from 'fs';
+              const r = scanMissionFile(readFileSync('$f','utf-8'));
+              const s = r.scan?.sensitive?.findings?.length || 0;
+              const m = r.scan?.malicious?.findings?.length || 0;
+              if (s + m > 0) { console.log('FAIL:' + s + ' sensitive, ' + m + ' malicious'); process.exit(1); }
+              else console.log('PASS');
+            " 2>&1) || FINDINGS=$((FINDINGS + 1))
+            echo "  $f: $RESULT" | tee -a install-report.md
+          done
+          if [ "$FINDINGS" -gt 0 ]; then
+            echo "::warning::$FINDINGS mission(s) have security findings"
+          else
+            echo "✅ All missions passed security scan" | tee -a install-report.md
+          fi
+
+      - name: 'Quality: Link validation'
+        if: steps.check.outputs.count != '0'
+        run: |
+          echo "" >> install-report.md
+          echo "## Link Validation" >> install-report.md
+          BROKEN=0
+          for f in $(find solutions/cncf-install -name '*.json' ! -name '.gitkeep' ! -name '*.draft.json'); do
+            REPO_URL=$(node -e "const d=JSON.parse(require('fs').readFileSync('$f','utf-8')); console.log(d.metadata?.sourceUrls?.repo || '')")
+            if [ -n "$REPO_URL" ]; then
+              STATUS=$(curl -sL -o /dev/null -w '%{http_code}' --max-time 10 "$REPO_URL" 2>/dev/null || echo "000")
+              if [ "$STATUS" -ge 400 ] || [ "$STATUS" = "000" ]; then
+                echo "  ⚠️ $f: $REPO_URL → HTTP $STATUS" | tee -a install-report.md
+                BROKEN=$((BROKEN + 1))
+              fi
+            fi
+          done
+          if [ "$BROKEN" -gt 0 ]; then
+            echo "::warning::$BROKEN mission(s) have broken source URLs"
+          else
+            echo "✅ All source URLs valid" | tee -a install-report.md
+          fi
+
+      - name: 'Quality: Version freshness'
+        if: steps.check.outputs.count != '0'
+        env:
+          GH_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}
+        run: |
+          echo "" >> install-report.md
+          echo "## Version Freshness" >> install-report.md
+          STALE=0
+          for f in $(find solutions/cncf-install -name '*.json' ! -name '.gitkeep' ! -name '*.draft.json'); do
+            read -r REPO VERSION <<< $(node -e "
+              const d=JSON.parse(require('fs').readFileSync('$f','utf-8'));
+              console.log((d.metadata?.sourceUrls?.repo || '').replace('https://github.com/','') + ' ' + (d.metadata?.projectVersion || 'latest'))
+            ")
+            if [ "$VERSION" != "latest" ] && [ -n "$REPO" ]; then
+              LATEST=$(curl -sL -H "Authorization: Bearer $GH_TOKEN" "https://api.github.com/repos/$REPO/releases/latest" 2>/dev/null | node -e "let d='';process.stdin.on('data',c=>d+=c);process.stdin.on('end',()=>{try{console.log(JSON.parse(d).tag_name||'')}catch{console.log('')}})" 2>/dev/null)
+              if [ -n "$LATEST" ] && [ "$LATEST" != "$VERSION" ]; then
+                echo "  ⚠️ $(basename $f): has $VERSION, latest is $LATEST" | tee -a install-report.md
+                STALE=$((STALE + 1))
+              fi
+            fi
+          done
+          if [ "$STALE" -gt 0 ]; then
+            echo "::warning::$STALE mission(s) reference outdated versions"
+          else
+            echo "✅ All versions current" | tee -a install-report.md
+          fi
+
+      - name: 'Quality: Rebuild index'
+        if: steps.check.outputs.count != '0'
+        run: |
+          node scripts/build-index.mjs
+          echo "" >> install-report.md
+          INDEXED=$(node -e "const d=JSON.parse(require('fs').readFileSync('solutions/index.json','utf-8')); console.log(d.count)")
+          echo "## Index: $INDEXED missions indexed" | tee -a install-report.md
+
+      - name: 'Quality: Command syntax smoke test'
+        if: steps.check.outputs.count != '0'
+        run: |
+          echo "" >> install-report.md
+          echo "## Command Smoke Test" >> install-report.md
+          BAD=0
+          for f in $(find solutions/cncf-install -name '*.json' ! -name '.gitkeep' ! -name '*.draft.json' | shuf | head -5); do
+            # Check that helm/kubectl commands have valid structure
+            CMDS=$(node -e "
+              const d=JSON.parse(require('fs').readFileSync('$f','utf-8'));
+              const steps = d.mission?.steps || [];
+              const cmds = steps.flatMap(s => (s.description||'').match(/(?:helm|kubectl|docker)\s+\w+[^\n\`]*/g) || []);
+              cmds.forEach(c => console.log(c.trim().slice(0, 120)));
+            ")
+            if [ -z "$CMDS" ]; then
+              echo "  ⚠️ $(basename $f): no CLI commands found" | tee -a install-report.md
+              BAD=$((BAD + 1))
+            else
+              echo "  ✅ $(basename $f): $(echo "$CMDS" | wc -l | tr -d ' ') commands found" | tee -a install-report.md
+            fi
+          done
+          if [ "$BAD" -gt 0 ]; then
+            echo "::warning::$BAD sampled mission(s) have no CLI commands"
+          fi
+
+      - name: Post generation summary
+        if: steps.check.outputs.count != '0'
+        run: |
+          echo "### Generation Summary" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
+          echo "| Metric | Value |" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
+          echo "|--------|-------|" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
+          echo "| Published | ${{ steps.report.outputs.published }} |" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
+          echo "| Drafts | ${{ steps.report.outputs.drafts }} |" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
+          echo "| Average Score | ${{ steps.report.outputs.avg_score }} |" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
+          echo "| Draft PR | ${{ steps.report.outputs.draft_pr }} |" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
+
+      # ── Create PR ───────────────────────────────────────────────
       - name: Create PR
         if: steps.check.outputs.count != '0'
         env:
@@ -177,7 +303,7 @@ jobs:
           git config user.email "41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com"
           BRANCH="cncf-install-gen-$(date +%Y%m%d)"
           git checkout -b "$BRANCH"
-          git add solutions/cncf-install/
+          git add solutions/cncf-install/ solutions/index.json
           git commit -s -m "✨ Auto-generate CNCF install missions ($(date +%Y-%m-%d))
 
           Generated install & configure missions across ${{ needs.plan.outputs.batch_count }} batches.
@@ -196,4 +322,5 @@ jobs:
             --body "$(cat install-report.md | head -500)" \
             --base master \
             --head "$BRANCH" \
+            --label "auto-generated,install-missions" \
             $DRAFT_FLAG

   { name: "cert-manager", repo: "cert-manager/cert-manager", maturity: "graduated", category: "security", sources: { stackoverflow: { tags: ["cert-manager", "kubernetes-cert-manager"] } } },
   { name: "cilium", repo: "cilium/cilium", maturity: "graduated", category: "networking", sources: { stackoverflow: { tags: ["cilium", "ebpf"] }, reddit: { subreddits: ["kubernetes", "networking"] } } },
   { name: "cloudevents", repo: "cloudevents/spec", maturity: "graduated", category: "app-definition" },
@@ -19,20 +22,28 @@ export const CNCF_PROJECTS = [
   { name: "envoy", repo: "envoyproxy/envoy", maturity: "graduated", category: "networking", sources: { stackoverflow: { tags: ["envoyproxy", "envoy"] }, reddit: { subreddits: ["kubernetes", "networking"] } } },
   { name: "etcd", repo: "etcd-io/etcd", maturity: "graduated", category: "orchestration", sources: { stackoverflow: { tags: ["etcd"] } } },
   { name: "falco", repo: "falcosecurity/falco", maturity: "graduated", category: "security", sources: { stackoverflow: { tags: ["falco"] } } },
+  { name: "falcosidekick", repo: "falcosecurity/falcosidekick", maturity: "graduated", category: "security", parentProject: "falco" },
   { name: "fluentd", repo: "fluent/fluentd", maturity: "graduated", category: "observability", sources: { stackoverflow: { tags: ["fluentd", "fluent-bit"] } } },
+  { name: "fluent-bit", repo: "fluent/fluent-bit", maturity: "graduated", category: "observability", parentProject: "fluentd", sources: { stackoverflow: { tags: ["fluent-bit"] } } },
   { name: "flux", repo: "fluxcd/flux2", maturity: "graduated", category: "app-definition", sources: { stackoverflow: { tags: ["fluxcd", "flux"] }, reddit: { subreddits: ["kubernetes", "devops"] } } },
+  { name: "flagger", repo: "fluxcd/flagger", maturity: "graduated", category: "app-definition", parentProject: "flux", sources: { stackoverflow: { tags: ["flagger"] } } },
   { name: "harbor", repo: "goharbor/harbor", maturity: "graduated", category: "security", sources: { stackoverflow: { tags: ["harbor", "goharbor"] } } },
   { name: "helm", repo: "helm/helm", maturity: "graduated", category: "app-definition", aliases: ["helm3", "helm-chart"], sources: { stackoverflow: { tags: ["kubernetes-helm", "helm"] }, reddit: { subreddits: ["kubernetes", "devops", "helm"] } } },
   { name: "in-toto", repo: "in-toto/in-toto", maturity: "graduated", category: "security" },
   { name: "istio", repo: "istio/istio", maturity: "graduated", category: "networking", aliases: ["istioctl", "istio-gateway"], sources: { stackoverflow: { tags: ["istio", "istio-gateway"] }, reddit: { subreddits: ["kubernetes", "istio"] } } },
   { name: "jaeger", repo: "jaegertracing/jaeger", maturity: "graduated", category: "observability", sources: { stackoverflow: { tags: ["jaeger", "jaeger-tracing"] } } },
   { name: "keda", repo: "kedacore/keda", maturity: "graduated", category: "app-definition", sources: { stackoverflow: { tags: ["keda"] } } },
   { name: "knative", repo: "knative/serving", maturity: "graduated", category: "app-definition", sources: { stackoverflow: { tags: ["knative"] } } },
+  { name: "knative-eventing", repo: "knative/eventing", maturity: "graduated", category: "app-definition", parentProject: "knative", sources: { stackoverflow: { tags: ["knative-eventing"] } } },
   { name: "kubeedge", repo: "kubeedge/kubeedge", maturity: "graduated", category: "app-definition", sources: { stackoverflow: { tags: ["kubeedge"] } } },
   { name: "kubernetes", repo: "kubernetes/kubernetes", maturity: "graduated", category: "orchestration", aliases: ["k8s", "kubectl", "kube"], sources: { stackoverflow: { tags: ["kubernetes", "kubectl", "k8s"] }, reddit: { subreddits: ["kubernetes", "k8s", "devops"] } } },
   { name: "linkerd", repo: "linkerd/linkerd2", maturity: "graduated", category: "networking", sources: { stackoverflow: { tags: ["linkerd", "linkerd2"] }, reddit: { subreddits: ["kubernetes"] } } },
+  { name: "linkerd-viz", repo: "linkerd/linkerd2", maturity: "graduated", category: "observability", parentProject: "linkerd", sources: { stackoverflow: { tags: ["linkerd-viz"] } } },
   { name: "open-policy-agent-opa-", repo: "open-policy-agent/opa", maturity: "graduated", category: "security", sources: { stackoverflow: { tags: ["open-policy-agent", "opa", "rego"] } } },
   { name: "prometheus", repo: "prometheus/prometheus", maturity: "graduated", category: "observability", aliases: ["prom", "promql"], sources: { stackoverflow: { tags: ["prometheus", "promql"] }, reddit: { subreddits: ["kubernetes", "devops", "prometheus"] } } },

   { name: "rook", repo: "rook/rook", maturity: "graduated", category: "storage" },
   { name: "spiffe", repo: "spiffe/spiffe", maturity: "graduated", category: "security" },
   { name: "spire", repo: "spiffe/spire", maturity: "graduated", category: "security" },
@@ -71,6 +82,8 @@ export const CNCF_PROJECTS = [
   { name: "openfga", repo: "openfga/openfga", maturity: "incubating", category: "security" },
   { name: "openkruise", repo: "openkruise/kruise", maturity: "incubating", category: "app-definition" },
   { name: "opentelemetry", repo: "open-telemetry/community", maturity: "incubating", category: "observability" },
+  { name: "opentelemetry-collector", repo: "open-telemetry/opentelemetry-collector", maturity: "incubating", category: "observability", parentProject: "opentelemetry", sources: { stackoverflow: { tags: ["opentelemetry-collector", "otel-collector"] } } },
+  { name: "opentelemetry-operator", repo: "open-telemetry/opentelemetry-operator", maturity: "incubating", category: "observability", parentProject: "opentelemetry", sources: { stackoverflow: { tags: ["opentelemetry-operator"] } } },
   { name: "openyurt", repo: "openyurtio/openyurt", maturity: "incubating", category: "app-definition" },
   { name: "operator-framework", repo: "operator-framework/operator-sdk", maturity: "incubating", category: "app-definition" },
   { name: "strimzi", repo: "strimzi/strimzi-kafka-operator", maturity: "incubating", category: "storage" },

@@ -229,6 +229,9 @@ Rules:
 
 function buildInstallPrompt(project, context) {
   const sections = [`# Install mission for: ${project.name} (${project.maturity})`]
+  if (project.parentProject) {
+    sections.push(`**This is a sub-component of the ${project.parentProject} project.** Generate a mission specifically for ${project.name} (repo: ${project.repo}), NOT the parent project.`)
+  }
   sections.push(`Category: ${project.category}`)
   sections.push(`Repo: github.com/${project.repo}`)
 
@@ -405,29 +408,40 @@ function buildMissionJson(project, llmResult, context, config) {
   const version = context.latestRelease?.tag_name || 'latest'
   const homepage = context.repoMeta?.homepage || `https://github.com/${project.repo}`
 
+  // Build a clear title that distinguishes sub-projects from their parent
+  const displayName = titleCase(project.name)
+  const repoShort = project.repo.split('/')[1] || project.repo
+  let missionTitle
+  if (project.parentProject) {
+    const parentName = titleCase(project.parentProject)
+    missionTitle = `Install and Configure ${displayName} (${parentName}) on Kubernetes`
+  } else {
+    missionTitle = `Install and Configure ${displayName} on Kubernetes`
+  }
+
   const mission = {
     version: 'kc-mission-v1',
     name: `install-${project.name}`,
     missionClass: 'install',
     author: authorConf.name || 'KubeStellar Bot',
     authorGithub: authorConf.github || 'kubestellar',
     mission: {
-      title: `Install and Configure ${titleCase(project.name)} on Kubernetes`,
-      description: llmResult.description || `Production-ready installation guide for ${project.name}.`,
+      title: missionTitle,
+      description: llmResult.description || `Production-ready installation guide for ${displayName} (${repoShort}).`,
       type: 'deploy',
       status: 'completed',
       steps: (llmResult.steps || []).map(s => ({
         title: s.title.slice(0, 120),
         description: s.description.slice(0, 3000),
       })),
       resolution: {
-        summary: llmResult.resolution || `${titleCase(project.name)} is installed and verified.`,
+        summary: llmResult.resolution || `${displayName} is installed and verified.`,
         codeSnippets: extractCodeSnippets(llmResult.steps || []),
       },
     },
     metadata: {
-      tags: ['installation', 'configuration', 'cncf', project.category, project.maturity],
-      cncfProjects: [project.name],
+      tags: ['installation', 'configuration', 'cncf', project.category, project.maturity, ...(project.parentProject ? [project.parentProject] : [])],
+      cncfProjects: project.parentProject ? [project.parentProject, project.name] : [project.name],
       targetResourceKinds: detectResourceKinds(llmResult.steps || []),
       difficulty: llmResult.difficulty || 'intermediate',
       issueTypes: ['installation', 'configuration'],
